objective: Add a docstring to `glitchlab/controller_utils.py::pre_task_git_fetch` documenting the soft-fail fetch behavior before planning.
commit_message: docs: clarify pre-task git fetch soft-fail behavior
implementation_summary: Updated the `pre_task_git_fetch` docstring in `glitchlab/controller_utils.py` to explicitly document that the fetch happens before planning and intentionally soft-fails with warnings so planning can continue in offline, sandboxed, or CI environments. Verified with `pytest tests/test_surgical_mode_cli_and_controller.py -q`.

data.description: Verifies the public soft-fail behavior of pre_task_git_fetch: it attempts to fetch origin/main before planning, and when git fetch fails it only logs a warning instead of raising so execution can continue.
